job_description:
The Role
As a Senior Machine Learning Engineer at an innovative product company, you will be responsible for designing, training, and deploying machine learning models in production. This role is ideal for engineers who combine strong technical foundations with genuine curiosity and a drive to take ownership. This is a senior position for someone capable of leading projects and mentoring other engineers.
Good to Have:
- Vector databases
- Experiment tracking
- Distributed training
- MLOps (MLflow, Kubeflow)
- Interest in AI and applying it to real products
- Familiarity with Agile / Scrum methodologies
Main Responsibilities:
- Own features end to end, from planning through deployment and monitoring
- Mentor teammates and share knowledge across the team
- Participate in technical decision-making and architecture discussions
- Ensure scalability, security, and maintainability across the codebase
- Troubleshoot, debug, and optimize existing systems for performance and reliability
- Collaborate with product, design, and engineering teams to deliver high-quality features
- Contribute to continuous improvement of engineering processes and best practices
Soft Skills (Critical for Success):
- Ability to work independently and collaboratively
- Excellent problem-solving and analytical skills
- A proactive, execution-focused mindset
- Comfort working in a fast-paced, ambiguous environment
- Strong ownership and accountability
- Adaptability and resilience under changing priorities
What We're Looking For:
- Feature engineering
- PyTorch or TensorFlow
- Model training and evaluation
- Python
- Scikit-learn
- 5+ years of professional experience in a similar role
- Solid computer science fundamentals, formal degree or self-taught
- Strong understanding of software engineering fundamentals

job_description:
Job Description
We're hiring a Mid-level Security Engineer to join our team at a global technology organization, where you'll focus on protecting systems, data, and users from security threats. This is a hands-on role for someone who thrives in a fast-paced, collaborative environment. This is a mid-level position for someone ready to take ownership of features and deliver independently.
Soft Skills (Critical for Success):
Adaptability and resilience under changing priorities
Excellent problem-solving and analytical skills
Strong ownership and accountability
Genuine curiosity and eagerness to learn new technologies
Ability to work independently and collaboratively
A team-oriented and reliable attitude
Nice to Haves:
Compliance frameworks (SOC 2, ISO 27001)
DevSecOps
Penetration testing
Familiarity with Agile / Scrum methodologies
What This Role Involves:
Review code and provide constructive feedback to peers
Write clean, maintainable, and well-tested code
Ensure scalability, security, and maintainability across the codebase
Design, develop, and maintain protecting systems, data, and users from security threats
Collaborate with product, design, and engineering teams to deliver high-quality features
Own features end to end, from planning through deployment and monitoring
Required Qualifications:
Secure coding practices
Threat modeling
Application and network security
IAM and access control
Vulnerability assessment
2-4 years of professional experience in a similar role
Degree in Computer Science or related field, or equivalent hands-on experience
Strong understanding of software engineering fundamentals
Required Certifications:
Certified Ethical Hacker (CEH)
CompTIA Security+
OSCP (Offensive Security Certified Professional)

job_description:
Our Ideal Candidate
Join an enterprise technology team as a Lead DevOps Engineer and play a key part in automating infrastructure, deployments, and delivery pipelines. You'll have the opportunity to influence architecture, tooling, and product direction from day one. This is a lead position for someone able to drive technical direction and lead a team.
Attributes:
* A team-oriented and reliable attitude
* Excellent problem-solving and analytical skills
* Clear written and verbal communication
* A proactive, execution-focused mindset
* Genuine curiosity and eagerness to learn new technologies
* Attention to detail and commitment to quality
Primary Responsibilities:
* Troubleshoot, debug, and optimize existing systems for performance and reliability
* Own features end to end, from planning through deployment and monitoring
* Write clean, maintainable, and well-tested code
* Contribute to continuous improvement of engineering processes and best practices
* Mentor teammates and share knowledge across the team
* Participate in technical decision-making and architecture discussions
Pluses:
* Service mesh (Istio)
* GitOps (ArgoCD)
* Helm
* Prometheus and Grafana
* Security automation
* Experience mentoring junior engineers
* Interest in AI and applying it to real products
Certifications:
* Certified Kubernetes Administrator (CKA)
What You'll Need:
* Terraform / Infrastructure as Code
* Docker and Kubernetes
* AWS, Azure, or GCP
* CI/CD pipelines
* Linux systems
* Solid computer science fundamentals, formal degree or self-taught
* Strong understanding of software engineering fundamentals

- Experience mentoring junior engineers

- Ability to work independently and collaboratively
- A proactive, execution-focused mindset
- Genuine curiosity and eagerness to learn new technologies
- A team-oriented and reliable attitude
- Attention to detail and commitment to quality
